name: Four Waterfalls Walk (Sgwd yr Eira)
terrain: Woodland paths, wet rock, steps, river gorges
highlights: Walk behind Sgwd yr Eira plus Sgwd Clun-Gwyn and Sgwd y Pannwr waterfalls.
water_features: Four major waterfalls on Afon Mellte/Hepste
parking_start: Gwaun Hepste or Cwm Porth NRW car parks
food_drink_nearby: New Inn Ystradfellte (seasonal); Angel Inn Pontneddfechan
hazards_notes: Slippery rocks; paths muddy and rooty; keep children close
